name: Chicken Jambalaya 1
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 2-quart saucepan, cook onion and celery in butter until golden brown.
2. Add chicken broth, rice, salt, and pepper; cover and cook over low heat for 20 minutes.
3. Add chicken and carrots; cook an additional 15 minutes, or until carrots are tender.
4. Sprinkle with parsley and serve.
